rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-light text-primary
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-light text-text_primary

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical SaaS designs to create a breathable, elegant feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID for public pages (asymmetry, large spanning images). MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' for Admin dashboard (dense, clear metrics).
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px delicate inner stroke for premium feel (border-[#E5DCC5])
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat solid surfaces with subtle borders. Avoid heavy drop shadows; use soft ambient shadows only where necessary.

motion.scroll_effects: Fade-in up staggered for lists and gallery items. Momentum scrolling recommended if possible.
motion.page_transitions: Smooth opacity transitions for an editorial feel.

components.navigation: Sticky nav with backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80, delicate bottom border. Must always display Ujjwal & Kasturika.
components.hero: Asymmetrical layout: large serif text with an arched (rounded-t-full) or soft-edged image. Max overlay opacity bg-black/30 if text overlays the image.
components.events_timeline: Vertical timeline with overlapping image cards and elegant serif dates. Generous spacing between events.
components.registry_cards: Flat cards, 1px subtle gold border, Outfit font for details, Cormorant Garamond for titles.
components.admin_dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing. Cardless or minimal cards with subtle borders.

hero.description: Indian couple in traditional attire, great for the hero section.

story.description: A bride and groom posing, ideal for Our Story timeline.

event_haldi.description: Woman in yellow sari with garland, perfect for Haldi event card.

event_mehendi.description: Woman in traditional green attire, perfect for Mehendi event card.

event_wedding.description: Close up of holding hands with henna and red bangles, perfect for Wedding event card.

gallery_decor.description: Elegant white flowers on a table, perfect for Reception or gallery.

texture_background.description: Gold metallic foil texture for subtle accents.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for normal text against ivory/beige backgrounds. Use deep charcoal (#2C2A28) for legibility, not pure black.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='rsvp-submit-button', data-testid='gift-fund-progress').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI using pure HTML+Tailwind for public pages to allow maximum creative freedom.
Use customized Shadcn components for interactive logic (RSVP dialogs, Admin Dashboard). Ensure Shadcn styling is stripped of its default 'Vercel-look' and aligns with the luxury ivory/gold theme.
Strictly follow the color palette: Ivory, Warm White, Champagne Gold, Soft Beige. Avoid loud gradients, bright red, or neon.
Apply 'Cormorant Garamond' to all headings and 'Outfit' to all body text. Never use Inter, Roboto, or Playfair.
Ensure generous spacing (py-20 to py-32) between sections on the public site.
Include specific event cards for Haldi, Mehendi, Wedding, and Reception utilizing the provided image URLs.
The admin dashboard should use a denser 'Control Room' grid layout but maintain the same premium typography and colors.
Implement the RSVP system as a sleek modal using Shadcn Dialog with customized beige/gold styling.
Implement the UPI QR code for Cash Gifts inside a visually distinct 'premium card' layout.
